case_title: KRISTINE ELLIS VS. GALLERIA TAILORS & CLEANDERS CORP.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.0 - SERVED JUN-30-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GALLERIA TAILORS & CLEANDERS CORP.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GALLERIA TAILORS & CLEANDERS CORP.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $679.69 FILED BY ELLIS, KRISTINE AS TO DEFENDANT GALLERIA TAILORS & CLEANDERS CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-24-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-24-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-24-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF KRISTINE ELLIS AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE JEANNE KU WONG, OWNER OF GALLERIA TAILORS & CLEANERS CORP. YING FAI KU WAS PLACED UNDER AND SERVED AS CANTONESE SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR MS. WONG. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELLIS, KRISTINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GALLERIA TAILORS & CLEANDERS CORP. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-24-2016 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO GALLERIA TAILORS & CLEANERS CORP. ON 08/24/16 RETURNED BY U.S. POSTAL SERVICE LABELED "RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
